description: Style NoteAdd a touch of sizzle to any outfit with this exotic clutch from pitaraa.  Choose from a variety of colours and styles for your next exciting night on the townProduct DetailsBronze envelop clutch that has a shimmery look and flap with a magnetic closureOne insert pocket with a zipped pocket inside the clutchMaterial and CareShimmery leatheretteSizeDimensions: 28.5 cm x 14.5 cm
